title: Package Registry Entry
description: Package from npm, PyPI, crates.io, etc.

registry.description: The package registry this entry comes from. Commonly found in: npmjs.com/package, pypi.org/project, crates.io/crates.

package_name.description: Name of the package as listed in the registry.

package_version.description: Version of the package this record describes.

latest_version.description: The latest stable version available in the registry.

license.description: SPDX license identifier or license name.

keywords.description: Keywords or tags associated with the package.

maintainers.description: List of maintainer usernames or names.

weekly_downloads.description: Number of downloads in the past 7 days.

dependent_packages_count.description: Number of packages that depend on this package.

github_stars.description: GitHub star count for the linked repository.

open_issues_count.description: Number of open issues on the repository.

first_published_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the package was first published.

last_published_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime of the most recent release.

deprecated.description: Whether the package has been marked as deprecated.

deprecation_message.description: Message explaining why or what to migrate to.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
